mapper.select: SELECT id, name, logo_url, score, sales_count, min_order_price, delivery_fee, delivery_time, status, ROUND(ST_Distance_Sphere(POINT(longitude, latitude), POINT(#{longitude}, #{latitude})), 0) AS distance FROM t_merchant WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND ST_Distance_Sphere(POINT(longitude, latitude), POINT(#{longitude}, #{latitude})) <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_merchant WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND ST_Distance_Sphere(POINT(longitude, latitude), POINT(#{longitude}, #{latitude})) <= #{radius}
